CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(Place.Street), "", Place.Street & BR() & IF( ISBLANK(Place.City), "", Place.City & ", " ) & IF( ISBLANK(Place.State), "", Place.State & " " ) & IF( ISBLANK(Place.PostalCode), "", Place.PostalCode ) & IF( ISBLANK(Place.Country), "", BR() & Place.Country ) )
CustomField.label: Place Address
